---
title: "QC"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(fs)
root <- normalizePath("..\\..\\..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
read_csv_safe <- function(...) readr::read_csv(fs::path(root, ...), show_col_types = FALSE)
qc_reg <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","QC","qc_registry_indicators.csv")
qc_rates <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","QC","qc_rates_consistency.csv")
qc_mortality_trace <- read_csv_safe("DATA","DERIVED","QC","qc_mortality_traceability_by_year.csv")
```

```{r}
qc_reg %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
qc_rates %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
qc_mortality_trace %>% knitr::kable()
```
